achievement_levels.Basic: Partial mastery of prerequisite knowledge and skills fundamental for proficient reading
achievement_levels.Proficient: Solid academic performance demonstrating competency over challenging reading material
achievement_levels.Advanced: Superior reading performance, demonstrating in-depth comprehension and analytical skills

Locate_and_Recall.description: Students identify and retrieve information explicitly stated in texts

grade_expectations.4: Locate specific details, facts, or ideas stated in the text
grade_expectations.8: Locate and recall specific information, recognize text structure
grade_expectations.12: Identify and retrieve complex information across multiple texts

Integrate_and_Interpret.description: Students connect and synthesize information within and across texts

grade_expectations.4: Make simple inferences; identify cause-effect and main idea
grade_expectations.8: Draw inferences; determine theme; compare across texts
grade_expectations.12: Synthesize ideas across complex texts; analyze author purpose

Critique_and_Evaluate.description: Students analyze and assess the quality and validity of texts

grade_expectations.4: Express preferences; distinguish fact and opinion
grade_expectations.8: Evaluate author's craft; assess arguments and evidence
grade_expectations.12: Critically evaluate texts for bias, perspective, and validity

Use_and_Apply.description: Students apply information from texts to solve problems and create new products

grade_expectations.4: Apply information read to solve a simple problem or complete a task
grade_expectations.8: Use text information to address a real-world problem or scenario
grade_expectations.12: Apply reading to complex problems; synthesize across disciplines

Reading_to_Develop_Understanding.description: Reading carefully to comprehend and analyze text

Reading_to_Solve_Problems.description: Reading strategically to accomplish a specific goal or task

grade_4.Basic: Locate relevant information, make simple inferences, and use their understanding of the text to identify details that support a given interpretation
grade_4.Proficient: Demonstrate an understanding of the overall meaning of what they have read. When reading literary texts, fourth-grade students at this level should be able to make relatively complex inferences
grade_4.Advanced: Generalize about topics in the reading selection and demonstrate an awareness of how authors compose and use literary devices. When reading informational text, students at this level should be able to judge text critically

grade_8.Basic: Demonstrate a literal understanding of what they have read and be able to make some interpretations
grade_8.Proficient: Show an overall understanding of the text, including inferential as well as literal information. When reading literary texts, eighth-grade students at this level should be able to extend the ideas in the text
grade_8.Advanced: Describe the more abstract themes and ideas of the overall text. When reading literary texts, eighth-grade students at this level should be able to analyze both meaning and form

grade_12.Basic: Demonstrate an overall understanding and make some interpretations of the text
grade_12.Proficient: Show an overall understanding of the text which includes inferential as well as literal information. Twelfth-grade students at this level should be able to connect parts of a text
grade_12.Advanced: Analyze both the meaning and the form of the text and provide thorough, thoughtful, and supported responses. Twelfth-grade students should be able to analyze and evaluate texts
